messages.content: How do I create a table in Antfly?
To create a table in Antfly, you use the CreateTable API endpoint. You specify the table name, number of shards, and index configurations including full-text (BM25) and embedding (vector) indexes.
What index types can I add to it?

description: Multi-turn follow-up: ask about tables then follow up about indexes

messages.content: I want to build a search feature for my app. What does Antfly offer?
Antfly offers hybrid search combining BM25 full-text search with vector semantic search using reciprocal rank fusion (RRF). It also supports reranking, filtering, and RAG for AI-generated answers.
Tell me more about the reranking part specifically.

description: Conversational refinement: broad question then narrow to reranking

messages.content: How does Antfly handle data consistency across nodes?
Can I use Antfly for RAG?
Yes, Antfly has built-in RAG support. You can use the RAG endpoint or the Answer Agent to retrieve relevant documents and generate AI-powered answers with citations.
What about a multi-turn chat experience with RAG?

description: Multi-turn about chat capabilities: ask about RAG then about chat agent

messages.content: What embedding providers does Antfly support?
Antfly supports multiple embedding providers including OpenAI, Google/Gemini, Ollama, Bedrock, Vertex AI, and Termite for local ONNX inference.
Which one should I use for local development?

description: Multi-turn recommendation: ask about providers then ask for local recommendation

messages.content: Explain how semantic search works in Antfly.
How do I sync data from an external database to Antfly?

Antfly provides the Linear Merge API for syncing external data sources. It performs a stateless, sorted merge of records - upserting new/changed records and deleting records that no longer exist in the source.
Does it support pagination for large datasets?

description: Multi-turn about data sync: ask about sync then about pagination
